queries.question: For each suburb, list the schools they have.
queries.sql: select suburbs.name , schools.school_type from suburbs_schools join schools on suburbs_schools.school_id = schools.id join suburbs on suburbs_schools.suburb_id = suburbs.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?school_type WHERE {
  ?suburbs_schools a :suburbs_schools .
  ?schools a :schools .
  ?suburbs_schools p:hasschools ?schools .
  ?suburbs a :suburbs .
  ?suburbs_schools p:hassuburbs ?suburbs .
  ?suburbs p:name ?name .
  ?schools p:school_type ?school_type .
}

queries.question: Tell me the schools every suburb has.
queries.sql: SELECT schools.school_type  from suburbs_schools join schools on suburbs_schools.school_id = schools.id join suburbs on suburbs_schools.suburb_id = suburbs.id   GROUP BY suburbs_schools.school_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT suburbs_schools.suburb_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  suburbs)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Tell me the schools every suburb has.
